title: FinPocket responsive marketing website (landing + supporting pages)

requirements.summary: Implement a mobile-first marketing site with routes/pages: Home, Features, About, Privacy Policy, and FAQ.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to each page route renders the correct page content: Home, Features, About, Privacy Policy, FAQ.
Navigation works on mobile and desktop (no broken links, no missing routes).
Layout is responsive and readable on small screens first, and scales cleanly to desktop widths.

file_operations.description: Create the top-level app router and page wiring for the five required routes (Home, Features, About, Privacy Policy, FAQ), ensuring navigation is not orphaned and all routes render.
Create a shared layout wrapper used by all routes to provide consistent header/nav, main container, and site-wide footer placement.
Create a mobile-first responsive header navigation (collapsible on small screens) with internal links to Home, Features, About, Privacy, and FAQ.
Create the Home page route component and ensure it is registered and reachable from the router.
Create the Features page route component and ensure it is registered and reachable from the router.
Create the About page route component and ensure it is registered and reachable from the router.
Create the Privacy Policy page route component and ensure it is registered and reachable from the router.
Create the FAQ page route component and ensure it is registered and reachable from the router.

requirements.summary: Build the Home page landing sections with the exact provided copy, including a disabled 'Coming Soon' CTA and a hero mockup image.
acceptanceCriteria: Home page contains all 7 sections in the specified order.
All listed text matches exactly (punctuation and capitalization preserved).
Hero section displays an app mockup placeholder image alongside the hero copy on desktop and stacks appropriately on mobile.
CTA button is visibly disabled or non-navigating and clearly indicates “Coming Soon” (no broken external links).

file_operations.description: Implement the 7 Home page sections in the specified order with exact user-facing copy, including a clearly disabled/non-navigating CTA labeled “Download (Coming Soon)” and rendering the hero mockup image from frontend/public/assets/generated/finpocket-mockup.dim_1200x900.png.

requirements.summary: Create a Features page with consistent icons and short descriptions for the five core features.
acceptanceCriteria: Features page includes one icon + short description block for each of the 5 core features listed by the user.
Icons are consistent in style and sized consistently across feature items.
Page remains mobile-first and uses a clean grid/list layout that adapts to desktop.

file_operations.description: Implement a mobile-first feature list/grid with one icon + short description block for each core feature, using generated icons: frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-quick-entry.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-categories.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-dashboard.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-local-storage.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-walkthrough.dim_256x256.png; ensure consistent sizing and styling across items.

requirements.summary: Create the About page with the provided mission/positioning copy and consistent site chrome.
acceptanceCriteria: About page renders the provided copy verbatim in a readable, professional layout.
Page includes consistent header/nav and footer shared with the rest of the site.

file_operations.description: Render the About page copy verbatim in a professional layout, ensuring it is wrapped by the shared SiteLayout so header/nav and footer match the rest of the site.
Ensure SiteLayout is used consistently across all pages so About (and others) share the same header/nav and footer.

requirements.summary: Create a Privacy Policy page showing the five provided policy statements clearly.
acceptanceCriteria: Privacy Policy page displays all five bullet points exactly as provided.
Page is readable on mobile and uses consistent typography with the rest of the site.

file_operations.description: Implement the Privacy Policy page with the five bullet points exactly as provided, using consistent typography and spacing with the site’s global styles.

requirements.summary: Create an FAQ page with the provided five Q&A items in a scannable, accessible format.
acceptanceCriteria: FAQ page contains all five FAQ items with the exact question/answer text.
FAQ items are formatted for easy scanning (e.g., accordion or clearly separated sections) while remaining accessible on mobile.

file_operations.description: Implement the five FAQ items with exact question/answer text using an accessible, mobile-friendly format (e.g., semantic details/summary accordion or clearly separated sections) for easy scanning.

requirements.summary: Add a site-wide footer with required links, copyright text, and a contact email placeholder.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer is visible on all pages and contains working internal links to the 5 pages.
Footer includes the exact copyright string “© 2026 FinPocket”.
Footer includes a visible contact email placeholder (not a real email unless provided by the user).

file_operations.description: Create a site-wide footer component containing internal links to Home, Features, About, Privacy, and FAQ; the exact copyright string “© 2026 FinPocket”; and a visible contact email placeholder.
Render the Footer component from SiteLayout so it appears on every page/route.

requirements.summary: Apply a clean, minimal, modern visual design system (soft blue/green/white) with mobile-first responsiveness and fast loading.
acceptanceCriteria: Site uses a consistent visual system (colors, spacing, typography) aligned with a soft blue/green/white palette.
All pages meet basic performance expectations (no unnecessary heavy assets; images optimized).
Typography is clean and readable across mobile and desktop.

file_operations.description: Add global Tailwind directives and define a soft blue/green/white theme via CSS variables and baseline typography rules, ensuring consistent spacing/typography across all pages.
Apply shared layout structure (max widths, padding, section spacing) to maintain a clean, modern, startup-style look that is mobile-first and scales to desktop.

Ensure the Home page sections use lightweight structure and responsive layout patterns; reference the hero image in a performance-conscious way (avoid oversized rendering; rely on the provided generated asset).
Ensure feature icons are rendered efficiently (consistent size, appropriate loading behavior) and the layout remains clean and responsive to support fast loading.

requirements.summary: Improve SEO via semantic HTML, per-page document titles, and per-page meta descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: Each page sets a distinct, relevant document title (e.g., “FinPocket — Privacy Policy”).
Each page includes a meta description relevant to its content.
Pages use semantic headings (H1 present and meaningful; sections structured logically).

file_operations.description: Add a baseline meta description tag in the HTML head that can be updated at runtime per route, and keep the HTML structure semantic (lang, charset, viewport already present).
Create a lightweight SEO helper component that sets document.title and updates/creates the meta description tag based on provided props for each page.
Use the shared Seo helper to set a relevant title and meta description for the Home page; ensure semantic structure with a single meaningful H1 and logically grouped sections.
Use the shared Seo helper to set a relevant title and meta description for the Features page; ensure semantic headings and section structure.
Use the shared Seo helper to set a relevant title and meta description for the About page; ensure semantic headings.
Use the shared Seo helper to set a relevant title and meta description for the Privacy Policy page (e.g., “FinPocket — Privacy Policy”); ensure semantic headings.
Use the shared Seo helper to set a relevant title and meta description for the FAQ page; ensure semantic headings and accessible Q&A structure.

requirements.summary: Add required generated static images to the frontend and render them in the Home hero and Features list.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated and are referenced directly by the frontend (not served through the backend).
Home hero displays the generated app mockup image.
Features page uses the generated icon set for the feature list with consistent sizing and styling.

file_operations.description: Add the generated hero mockup asset at the exact required path so it can be referenced directly by the frontend UI.
Add the generated feature icon asset at the exact required path so it can be referenced directly by the frontend UI.
Add the generated feature icon asset at the exact required path so it can be referenced directly by the frontend UI.
Add the generated feature icon asset at the exact required path so it can be referenced directly by the frontend UI.
Add the generated feature icon asset at the exact required path so it can be referenced directly by the frontend UI.
Add the generated feature icon asset at the exact required path so it can be referenced directly by the frontend UI.

Reference and render the generated mockup image from frontend/public/assets/generated/finpocket-mockup.dim_1200x900.png in the hero section (as required) and ensure responsive behavior on mobile vs desktop.

Reference and render the generated feature icons from frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-quick-entry.dim_256x256.png, icon-categories.dim_256x256.png, icon-dashboard.dim_256x256.png, icon-local-storage.dim_256x256.png, icon-walkthrough.dim_256x256.png with consistent sizing and alignment.
